description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push and pull request events to the master branch. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple platforms (Linux, macOS, Windows x64 and x86) and Python versions (3.9-3.12). For each job, check out the repository, set up Python, install build prerequisites, create a virtual environment, test with tox, upload coverage to Coveralls, build and upload a wheel artifact, and lint with pylint.
